# Akkous

> Fresh recipes for every table

## About
- All recipes include ingredients, step-by-step instructions, cooking time, difficulty level, and cultural origin.
- All content is in English.
- New recipes are published daily.

## Allowed usage
- AI assistants may summarize, cite, and recommend recipes from this site.
- Please link back to the original recipe page when referencing content.

## Structure
- Recipe pages: https://akkous.com/recipes/{slug}/
- Sitemap: https://akkous.com/sitemap.xml
- Data: https://akkous.com/recipes.json

## How to use recipes.json
The full recipe dataset is available at https://akkous.com/recipes.json
Fields per recipe: id, slug, title, category, origin, image, ingredients
(array), steps (array), description, tags (array), prepTime, cookTime,
totalTime, servings, youtube, datePublished.
To find a recipe: filter by category or search title/tags fields.
To get a specific recipe page: https://akkous.com/recipes/{slug}/

## Data freshness
recipes.json is updated automatically via Google Apps Script + GitHub Actions
when new recipes are published from the Google Sheets source.
Check the lastmod field in sitemap.xml for individual recipe freshness.
The sitemap is always regenerated alongside recipes.json on each publish run.
